codeReview.summary: The refactor introduces an explicit SetupStage enum and central transition_to(stage) owner, keeps ContentSwitcher updates centralized, resets downstream stage state through transition logic, and preserves the required back-navigation state behaviors. The commit also adds focused Pilot tests covering stage history, single-pane invariants, back-nav preservation, rapid toggling, auto-setup short-circuiting, downstream reset behavior, and reserved status-line geometry.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Textual child-removal behavior (`remove_children`) required ad-hoc runtime investigation during implementation; this async/removal timing nuance is not captured in shared library docs and caused extra exploratory loops.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 25a5a05b-1f94-4f99-8c7c-eb9bf1b7adb0 shows multiple API introspection/debug commands, including a temporary harness output: "after call 2 AwaitRemove" then "after pause 0" while investigating widget removal/mount timing.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 7070937 diff for state-machine-restructure. Implementation matches the feature’s required state-machine and navigation behaviors with no blocking or non-blocking defects identified in-scope; review status is pass.
